questions.text: Per official CompTIA exam objectives and study resources, which source should you use when studying Server Hardware and Virtualization for CompTIA Server+?
questions.explanation: Use Server+ Exam Objectives and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: According to 'Server+ Exam Objectives', what is a documented best practice for Server Hardware and Virtualization?

questions.text: Which approach BEST supports the objective to choose RAID level for performance and redundancy?

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

questions.text: Which approach BEST supports the objective to plan rack power and cooling?

options.text: Redundant PSUs and adequate BTU capacity

questions.text: Which approach BEST supports the objective to virtualize physical servers?
What should you do FIRST to choose RAID level for performance and redundancy?

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

questions.text: Which option is MOST appropriate to choose RAID level for performance and redundancy?

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

questions.text: A technician must choose RAID level for performance and redundancy. What is the best choice?

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

questions.text: What should you do FIRST to plan rack power and cooling?

options.text: Redundant PSUs and adequate BTU capacity

questions.text: Which option is MOST appropriate to plan rack power and cooling?

options.text: Redundant PSUs and adequate BTU capacity

questions.text: A technician must plan rack power and cooling. What is the best choice?

options.text: Redundant PSUs and adequate BTU capacity

questions.text: What should you do FIRST to virtualize physical servers?
Which option is MOST appropriate to virtualize physical servers?
A technician must virtualize physical servers. What is the best choice?
Per CompTIA best practices, you should choose RAID level for performance and redundancy.

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

questions.text: For compliance, the team must plan rack power and cooling.

options.text: Redundant PSUs and adequate BTU capacity

questions.text: On the job, you need to virtualize physical servers.
During troubleshooting, you must choose RAID level for performance and redundancy.

options.text: RAID 10 or RAID 5 based on workload

questions.text: During troubleshooting, you must apply firmware updates safely.
Per CompTIA best practices, you should harden default services.

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.text: For compliance, the team must apply firmware updates safely.
Which capability is provided by Disable unused roles and close ports rather than Vendor advisories and staged rollout when you need to harden default services?

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.explanation: Hardening shrinks attack surface. Compare with Vendor advisories and staged rollout: Firmware fixes hardware-level issues.

options.text: Disable unused roles and close ports

questions.explanation: Firmware fixes hardware-level issues. Compare with Disable unused roles and close ports: Hardening shrinks attack surface.
